content: Plan: Clone chainlink repo to read its docs, then write 02-the-methodology/02-tracking-your-work.md. Chapter structure: (1) why memory fails at scale, (2) what issue tracking actually is, (3) guided build of a simple tracker as portfolio project #2, (4) introduce Chainlink as the real tool and map concepts to its features. Will also update README.md.
